concerns.text: Task T013b (Filter logged comparisons... select stratified random sample... writing to consensus_sample.json) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task is the direct implementation of the sampling step required by FR-003 ('validate this proxy by running LLM consensus on a random [deferred] sample'). Without this task being executable, the LLM consensus validation (T014) cannot receive the required input sample, leaving FR-003 unimplemented.

Task T042 (Synthetic Data Fallback Blocker) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task addresses the 'Loader must fail loudly' rule and Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) by preventing silent fallbacks. Its absence means the pipeline lacks a critical guardrail against data integrity failures, leaving the requirement for strict data hygiene partially unimplemented.

Task T043 (Semantic Similarity Threshold Validator) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task directly implements the validation logic for Edge Case 2 (injection failure) and FR-002 (injecting redundancy with similarity > 0.95). Without this task, the system cannot verify that the synthetic data injection succeeded, leaving FR-002's quality constraint unenforced.

Task T044 (Cluster Integrity Check) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task addresses Edge Case 1 (false positive merges) and FR-001 (MinHash-LSH grouping). Without this task, the system cannot detect or handle incorrect clustering, leaving the robustness requirement for FR-001 unimplemented.

Task T045 (Budget Exhaustion Early Exit) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task implements the logic for Edge Case 3 (low budget) and ensures the system halts gracefully rather than failing mid-execution. Its absence leaves the system vulnerable to incomplete runs, violating the robustness implied by the edge case handling requirements.

Task T047 (MinHash Parameter Sensitivity Report) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task is the explicit implementation of SC-005 ('sensitivity... measured by sweeping... produce the specific sensitivity report'). Without this task, the success criterion SC-005 cannot be satisfied as no report artifact is generated.

Task T048 (Cross-Dataset Generalization Check) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task directly implements FR-009 ('validate... against a small set of real-world near-duplicates... to ensure generalizability'). Without this task, the requirement to validate generalizability across datasets is unimplemented.

Task T049 (Multiple Comparison Correction Audit) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task implements the documentation requirement for FR-007 ('apply a multiple-comparison correction... to control the family-wise error rate') by explicitly listing hypotheses and adjusted p-values. Its absence leaves the scientific rigor of FR-007 unverified in the output artifacts.

Task T050 (Environment Validation for Embedding Model) is marked as incomplete [ ]. This task ensures Constitution Principle VII (Resource-Constrained Execution) by verifying the embedding model's CPU compatibility. Without it, the pipeline risks failing on the target runner due to GPU dependencies, leaving the resource constraint validation incomplete.
